description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a spacious front courtyard, featuring a paved driveway and landscaped garden beds. The structure is primarily composed of clean, geometric lines and large rectangular windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The exterior is finished in a combination of light and dark gray tones, with some sections featuring accent walls. There is a visible garage area on one side, with space for multiple vehicles, and a small patio or seating area adjacent to the main entrance. The rear of the bungalow includes additional outdoor space, possibly for recreation or relaxation, and a water tank is visible on one side. The overall design emphasizes functionality, openness, and a contemporary aesthetic suitable for urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a large paved courtyard, geometric lines, and expansive windows, finished in light and dark gray tones. Features include a garage, landscaped areas, and a rear patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved driveway, garage, and landscaped garden beds.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the garage, rear patio, and water tank, with a clear view of the flat roof and outdoor spaces.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the rear courtyard, additional parking, and the arrangement of windows and doors along the back facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the water tank, side patio, and the overall length of the bungalow with its flat roof and window placements.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
